ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders the case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Continued To Feb-02-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 2/2/2011 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
